creator: Kevin@es.net
text:
After upgrading boost-python from 1.34 to 1.37, deluge will hang on 
startup. Only the basic frame is drawn and the process freezes. It must
be killed to do anything. 

I have no idea if the problem is with deluge or boost-python.

Fix: 

Downgrade boost-python to 1.34.1
How-To-Repeat: Bring all ports ip-to-date and start deluge.
